news.t: 21shares Launches TKNS, Its First Actively Managed Crypto ETF, Bringing Dynamic Digital Asset Exposure to U.S. Investors

overview.description: The 21Shares Active Crypto ETF (TKNS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long cryptocurrency basket, short usd currency. The fund is an actively managed ETF, providing exposure to a selection of digital assets chosen by the fund advisor. The exposure may be direct or indirect and range from well-known assets like bitcoin to smaller tokens TKNS was launched on May 14, 2026 and is issued by 21Shares.

data.title: 21shares Launches TKNS, Its First Actively Managed Crypto ETF, Bringing Dynamic Digital Asset Exposure to U.S. Investors
data.text: NEW YORK, May 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- 21shares, one of the world's leading issuers of crypto exchange-traded funds (ETFs), today announced the launch of the 21shares Active Crypto ETF (Ticker: TK...
